revision.comment: Bot: create Islamic-calendar day stub
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Muharram 2''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 2nd day of the month [[Muharram]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 2 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Muharram]] [[ar:2 محرم]] [[bn:২ মুহররম]] [[ckb:٢ی موحەڕڕەم]] [[commons:Category:2 Muharram]] [[fa:۲ محرم]] [[id:2 Muharam]] [[pnb:2 محرم]] [[sd:2 محرم]] [[ur:2 محرم]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Muharram 2''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 2nd day of the month [[Muharram]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 2 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Muharram]] [[ar:2 محرم]] [[bn:২ মুহররম]] [[ckb:٢ی موحەڕڕەم]] [[commons:Category:2 Muharram]] [[fa:۲ محرم]] [[id:2 Muharam]] [[pnb:2 محرم]] [[sd:2 محرم]] [[ur:2 محرم]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

{{Islamic Muharram}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Muharram 2''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 2nd day of the month [[Muharram]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 2 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Muharram]] [[ar:2 محرم]] [[bn:২ মুহররম]] [[ckb:٢ی موحەڕڕەم]] [[commons:Category:2 Muharram]] [[fa:۲ محرم]] [[id:2 Muharam]] [[pnb:2 محرم]] [[sd:2 محرم]] [[ur:2 محرم]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

{{Islamic Muharram}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Muharram 2''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 2nd day of the month [[Muharram]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 2 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Muharram]] [[ar:2 محرم]] [[bn:২ মুহররম]] [[ckb:٢ی موحەڕڕەم]] [[commons:Category:2 Muharram]] [[fa:۲ محرم]] [[id:2 Muharam]] [[pnb:2 محرم]] [[sd:2 محرم]] [[ur:2 محرم]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.text:
{{Islamic Muharram}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Muharram 2''' is a day of the [[:en:Islamic calendar|Islamic calendar]]. It is the 2nd day of the month [[Muharram]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 2 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Muharram]] [[ar:2 محرم]] [[bn:২ মুহররম]] [[ckb:٢ی موحەڕڕەم]] [[commons:Category:2 Muharram]] [[fa:۲ محرم]] [[id:2 Muharam]] [[pnb:2 محرم]] [[sd:2 محرم]] [[ur:2 محرم]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""
adding the templates to the front above the calendar template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add wikidata link from Indonesian interwiki (Q4121379)
working on the date checking
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qqqqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qqqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Unchecked Islamic Dates]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qqqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove incorrect Shona (sn:) interwiki links
Bot: add interwikis from Wikidata
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:2 محرم]][[bn:২ মুহররম]][[ckb:٢ی موحەڕڕەم]][[commons:Category:2 Muharram]][[fa:۲ محرم]][[id:2 Muharam]][[ms:2 Muharam]][[pnb:2 محرم]][[sd:2 محرم]][[ur:2 محرم]]
{{Expand Arabic}}
{{Expand Bengali}}
{{Expand Persian}}
{{Islamic Muharram}}

'''Muharram 2''' is a day of the [[:en:Islamic calendar|Islamic calendar]]. It is the 2nd day of the month [[Muharram]].

==See also==

'''Muharram 2''' is a day of the [[:en:Islamic calendar|Islamic calendar]]. It is the 2nd day of the month [[Muharram]].

[[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]]{{wikidata link|Q4121379}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]]

'''Muharram 2''' is a day of the {{ill|Islamic calendar|en|Islamic calendar|WD=Q28892|lt=Islamic calendar}}. It is the 2nd day of the month [[Muharram]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[ar:2 محرم]] [[bn:২ মুহররম]] [[ckb:٢ی موحەڕڕەم]] {{Commons Category|2 Muharram}} [[fa:۲ محرم]] [[id:2 Muharam]] [[pnb:2 محرم]] [[sd:2 محرم]] [[ur:2 محرم]] {{Islamic Calendar}} {{wikidata link|Q4121379}} [[Category:Days 2 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Muharram]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:pages]]
